subject: A large, imposing panda-like creature in a rocky outdoor setting with a threatening pose
description: A large, bulky, dark-furred panda-like creature stands in a rocky landscape. Its body is predominantly dark grey or black with white markings at the face and chest area. It has a imposing, broad frame and its posture suggests power and aggression. A leaf or stem is visible near its mouth. The background shows rocky terrain in warm brown and grey tones, reinforcing a sense of raw strength and wilderness.
foreground: Large dark panda-like creature with powerful build and leaf in mouth
background: Rocky terrain in warm brown and grey tones
emotion: intimidating and dominant; powerful stance projects threat
